question.stem: A robotics club is iterating on a scoring dashboard and must divide work among members with different strengths. Which plan best supports efficient development?
choices: Have everyone edit every file simultaneously
Assign modules by expertise and define integration checkpoints
question.explanation: Role-based decomposition with integration milestones improves team productivity. A common wrong choice is "Have everyone edit every file simultaneously" because it sounds plausible but does not address the core condition. Takeaway: identify the exact requirement before selecting an approach.
